# Chapter 6: Simulation and digital twins  (~110 pp)
- 6.1 Simulation as design tool (12) · 6.2 Verification of simulation (15) · 6.3 Validation against measurement (15) · 6.4 Uncertainty quantification in simulation (18) · 6.5 Multi-physics coupling (15) · 6.6 Digital twins (15) · 6.7 The cost and limit of simulation (12) · 6.8 Failure section: simulations that fooled their builders (8)

**Archetype**: uncertainty, scaling. **Project**: build a small simulation of a previous project; compare to measured data; report properly. **Exercises**: 25.
